gold: MATCH (n:Player)-[r1:playsPosition]->(m1:Position {name: 'swingman'}) OPTIONAL MATCH (n:Player)-[r0:receivesAward]->(m0:Award) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.name, num
